universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, with SMS opt-in and not suppressed, currently active with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps, prioritized by conversion rate weight (0.6)
name: High-conversion diabetes care gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive')
rationale: Members with diabetes and an open preventive care gap are most likely to convert. This bucket is optimized for conversion rate due to the high weight (0.6) and the structural advantage of having an open gap. The SMS should emphasize the importance of preventive care and the benefits of scheduling an appointment.
suggested_treatment: Focus on the importance of preventive care and the benefits of scheduling an appointment for diabetes management.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, with SMS opt-in and not suppressed, currently active with an active enrollment. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days' AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied')
rationale: Members with diabetes who have recently replied to SMS messages are likely to be engaged and responsive. This bucket is optimized for open rate due to the weight (0.25) and their prior engagement. The SMS should be concise and action-oriented.
suggested_treatment: Send a concise and action-oriented SMS to encourage scheduling an appointment for diabetes management.
